How to Play

The Game

One player is the Hider, the other is the Guesser. The Hider secretly holds one card. The Guesser must figure out which card it is!

Each Turn

  • Guesser draws a card face-up
  • Pass to Hider: Suspect! = at least 1 thing matches · Not a Suspect = nothing matches
  • Card goes straight to the clue board
  • Tap any clue board card to change its answer

Winning

  • Tap "I know who it is!" and pick all 3 correctly → Guesser wins
  • Wrong guess → Hider wins
